description: Style NoteWhen it comes to everyday accessories, we recommend this wallet from lino perros which is the ultimate blend of durability and style. A coloured binding along the edge of the wallet gives it a quirky edge while its multiple pouches and slots help you keep yourself organized.Product DetailsBlack wallet with green binding around the circumferenceTextured surfaceTwo main compartmentsThree card slots on left with slip pocketCentre flap with three card slots and a mesh id card holderOne slip pocket and one coin pocket on right with embossed brandingBrand logo embossed on the frontMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustSize12 cm x 9 cm
